title: ferray-ma: no masked array I/O support (save/load)
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy saves MaskedArrays via np.ma.dump/load (pickle-based) and more commonly as separate data+mask arrays in .npz files. ferray-io has no special support for MaskedArray — users must save data and mask as separate .npy files or in a single .npz. A convenience function (save_masked, load_masked) that handles the data+mask pair in a .npz would improve usability.
